founder.name: Heriberto
founder.origin_story: There wasn't one clean moment. It was a period where everything broke at once. Before COVID, I went through something that physically changed me. After that night, my body wasn't the same. Sleep, strength, stamina — everything became unpredictable. From the outside I looked fine. Internally I was dealing with something constant and invisible. There were long stretches where I didn't know if I would recover. I felt disconnected from my own body, like I had lost control. But I didn't stop. I focused on what I could control: nutrition, small effort, discipline. Even when my body felt unreliable, I kept showing up. Over time, slowly, things started to return — not perfectly, but enough to remind me I wasn't done.
founder.brand_meaning: Primal source means returning to yourself when everything else is stripped away. Not nature outside — but your internal nature. Your baseline. Who you are without noise or illusion.
founder.who_its_for: This brand exists because I lived through losing that connection — and rebuilding it. It's for those doing the same, even if no one else can see it.
